name: crypto
description: Cryptographic utility nodes for Cognigy.AI — hashing, encryption, decryption, and HMAC

scripts.build: npm run transpile && npm run lint && npm run zip
scripts.zip: tar cfz $npm_package_name-$npm_package_version.tar.gz build/* package.json package-lock.json README.md

author: Ben Elliot <ben.elliot@nice.com>
